author: Steve Jobs
quote: THE ONLY WAY TO DO GREAT WORK IS TO LOVE WHAT YOU DO.

author: Nelson Mandela
quote: IT ALWAYS SEEMS IMPOSSIBLE UNTIL IT IS DONE.

author: Oscar Wilde
quote: BE YOURSELF; EVERYONE ELSE IS ALREADY TAKEN.

author: Albert Einstein
quote: IMAGINATION IS MORE IMPORTANT THAN KNOWLEDGE.

author: Walt Disney
quote: THE WAY TO GET STARTED IS TO QUIT TALKING AND BEGIN DOING.

author: Eleanor Roosevelt
quote: THE FUTURE BELONGS TO THOSE WHO BELIEVE IN THEIR DREAMS.

author: Mahatma Gandhi
quote: BE THE CHANGE THAT YOU WISH TO SEE IN THE WORLD.

author: John Lennon
quote: LIFE IS WHAT HAPPENS WHEN YOU ARE BUSY MAKING OTHER PLANS.

author: Mark Twain
quote: THE SECRET OF GETTING AHEAD IS GETTING STARTED.

author: Franklin D. Roosevelt
quote: THE ONLY THING WE HAVE TO FEAR IS FEAR ITSELF.

author: Victor Hugo
quote: LIRE, C'EST BOIRE ET MANGER. L'ESPRIT QUI NE LIT PAS MAIGRIT.

author: Jean-Paul Sartre
quote: L'ENFER, C'EST LES AUTRES.

author: Saint-Exupery
quote: ON NE VOIT BIEN QU'AVEC LE COEUR. L'ESSENTIEL EST INVISIBLE.

author: Albert Camus
quote: AU MILIEU DE L'HIVER, J'AI DECOUVERT EN MOI UN INVISIBLE ETE.

author: Blaise Pascal
quote: LE COEUR A SES RAISONS QUE LA RAISON NE CONNAIT POINT.

author: Moliere
quote: IL FAUT MANGER POUR VIVRE ET NON PAS VIVRE POUR MANGER.

author: Voltaire
quote: J'AI DECIDE D'ETRE HEUREUX PARCE QUE C'EST BON POUR LA SANTE.

author: Charles de Gaulle
quote: LA DIFFICULTE ATTIRE L'HOMME DE CARACTERE.

author: Simone de Beauvoir
quote: ON NE NAIT PAS FEMME, ON LE DEVIENT.

author: Napoleon Bonaparte
quote: L'IMPOSSIBLE N'EST PAS FRANCAIS!
